attributes.name: Adult Beginner 2 & 3 - Saturday 9:15am
attributes.description: sPLEASE DO NOT ENROLL IN A CLASS NOT APPROPRIATE TO YOUR LEVEL!The adult curriculum is designed for beginning, intermediate and experienced adult skaters who wish to improve their skating skills. Participation in the program will help promote physical fitness and improve balance and coordination while teaching proper skating techniques. Group instruction includes a 30 minute class and 30 minute supervised practice, Beginner 2 (Alpha equivalent) & Adult Beginner 2 1. Forward Stroking 2. Forward Crossovers left over right (5) 3. Forward Crossovers right over left (5) 4. One foot snowplow stop 5. Two foot turn   Beginner 3 (Beta equivalent) & Adult Beginner 3 1. Backward Crossovers right over left (5) 2. Backward Crossovers left over right (5) 3. Backward Stroking (6) 4. Right T-Stop 5. Left T-Stop 6. Introduction to Forward Edges   I
